title: Bridge Essay: Embodied Predictions, Agency, and Psychosis.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Nested Agency** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Free will — sense of agency, voluntary action, intentional binding, volitional control.

**Embodied Predictions, Agency, and Psychosis.**. Front Big Data.. PMID: 33693400. DOI: 10.3389/fdata.2020.00027. Psychotic symptoms, i.e., hallucinations and delusions, involve gross departures from conscious apprehension of consensual reality; respectively, perceiving and believing things that, according to same culture peers, do not obtain. In schizophrenia, those experiences are often related to abnormal sense of control over one'sown actions, often expressed as adistorted sense of agency (i.e., passivity symptoms).
